ENGAGEMENT LETTER
=================

Date: March 15, 2026

To:    Acme Corporation
       Attention: Sarah Chen, Chief Operating Officer
       400 Madison Avenue, Suite 1200
       New York, NY 10017
       sarah.chen@acme-corp.example
       Phone: +1 (212) 555-0143

From:  Aksha Pilot Consulting LLC
       100 Pine Street, Suite 2500
       San Francisco, CA 94111

Re:    Strategy Review Engagement — Fixed-Fee Advisory Services

Dear Ms. Chen,

Thank you for selecting Aksha Pilot Consulting to assist Acme Corporation
with the 2026 strategic review of its B2B SaaS portfolio. This letter
("Engagement Letter") sets forth the terms under which we will perform
the services described below.

1. SCOPE OF SERVICES
--------------------
We will deliver a 6-week strategic review covering:

  (a) Competitive landscape analysis of the top 5 Acme SaaS competitors,
      with quarterly revenue and growth data sourced from public filings
      and industry reports.

  (b) Customer-segment economics review: ARR, gross margin, CAC, and
      LTV/CAC ratios across Acme's three primary verticals (Healthcare,
      Financial Services, Retail).

  (c) Three strategic-option recommendations with associated financial
      models projecting 24-month outcomes under each option.

  (d) A board-ready deliverable (50-page PDF + executive summary deck)
      to be presented to the Acme Board of Directors on May 14, 2026.

2. FEE ARRANGEMENT
------------------
This is a FIXED-FEE engagement.

  Total Fixed Fee:           USD $50,000.00
  Billing Schedule:          50% upon execution of this letter,
                             50% upon final deliverable acceptance.

  Out-of-pocket expenses (travel, third-party data subscriptions)
  are billed at cost, with a not-to-exceed cap of USD $5,000.00,
  invoiced monthly with supporting receipts.

3. ENGAGEMENT PERIOD
--------------------
  Start Date:    April 1, 2026
  End Date:      May 14, 2026
  Duration:      6 weeks

4. PROJECT TEAM
---------------
  Engagement Partner:        Maya Iyer, Managing Director
  Project Manager:           David Park, Senior Manager
  Analyst:                   Priya Sharma, Associate

5. PAYMENT TERMS
----------------
  Invoices are due NET 30 from invoice date.
  Late payments accrue interest at 1.5% per month.
  All amounts are quoted in US Dollars (USD) and exclude any
  applicable state or local taxes.

6. CONFIDENTIALITY
------------------
Both parties acknowledge that information exchanged in connection with
this engagement is confidential. Standard NDA terms (separate mutual
NDA signed January 12, 2026) govern.

7. ACCEPTANCE
-------------
Please indicate Acme Corporation's acceptance of this Engagement Letter
by counter-signing below and returning a copy to our office.

We look forward to working with Acme on this important initiative.

Sincerely,

/s/ Maya Iyer
________________________________
Maya Iyer
Managing Director
Aksha Pilot Consulting LLC

ACCEPTED AND AGREED:

Acme Corporation

By: /s/ Sarah Chen
    ________________________________
    Sarah Chen
    Chief Operating Officer
    Date: March 18, 2026
